response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed on-screen text for the song title '正しくなれない' and composer/artist 'ACAね'. 2. Identified the song as 'Tadashiku Narenai' by ZUTOMAYO. 3. response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue intro followed by a musical performance of the song 'Tadashiku Narenai' by two virtual characters, Haachama (Akai Haato) and another, ending in an animated segment.

scenes.description: Dialogue intro between two virtual characters.
The two characters perform the song 'Tadashiku Narenai'. On-screen text indicates the song title and composer (ACA-Ne).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 正しくなれない霧が毒をみた 片っ端から確かめたくて 考え続けたい 偽りで出会えた 僕らは何一つも 奪われてないから 僕ら育ってゆくみたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Can't be right The fog has poisoned I want to check from one end I want to keep thinking We met in a lie. We haven't been robbed of anything So it seems we are growing up
